---
pagetitle: "Cubes"
title-block-style: none
page-layout: article
toc: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(googlesheets4)

gs4_auth(email = Sys.getenv("GOOGLE_MAIL"))
source("../R/elo_table.R")

table_players <- fetch_table_players()

sheet_url <- "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1bq5DXQs1nobk0nu9cN-4UOHPkcPK3fvkTLa2t2lVNKk/edit?usp=sharing"
raw_matches <- read_sheet(sheet_url) |>
  mutate(
    match_id = row_number(),
    date = as_date(date),
    player1 = str_to_title(player1),
    player2 = str_to_title(player2),
    cube = str_to_title(cube)
  )

games <- raw_matches |>
  pivot_longer(game1:game3, names_to = "game", values_to = "winner") |>
  drop_na(winner) |>
  mutate(winner = str_to_title(winner))

per_cube_player <- bind_rows(
  games |> transmute(player = player1, cube, win = as.integer(winner == player1)),
  games |> transmute(player = player2, cube, win = as.integer(winner == player2))
) |>
  group_by(player, cube) |>
  summarise(
    wins = sum(win),
    losses = n() - sum(win),
    total = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(winrate = round(wins / total * 100)) |>
  filter(str_to_lower(player) %in% table_players)

match_results <- games |>
  group_by(match_id, date, player1, player2, cube) |>
  summarise(
    p1_game_wins = sum(winner == player1),
    p2_game_wins = sum(winner == player2),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(match_winner = if_else(p1_game_wins > p2_game_wins, player1, player2))

event_match_stats <- bind_rows(
  match_results |> transmute(date, cube, player = player1,
                             match_win = as.integer(match_winner == player1)),
  match_results |> transmute(date, cube, player = player2,
                             match_win = as.integer(match_winner == player2))
) |>
  group_by(date, cube, player) |>
  summarise(
    match_wins = sum(match_win),
    matches = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

event_game_stats <- bind_rows(
  games |> transmute(date, cube, player = player1,
                     game_win = as.integer(winner == player1)),
  games |> transmute(date, cube, player = player2,
                     game_win = as.integer(winner == player2))
) |>
  group_by(date, cube, player) |>
  summarise(
    game_wins = sum(game_win),
    game_losses = n() - sum(game_win),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

event_player_matches <- event_match_stats |>
  left_join(event_game_stats, by = c("date", "cube", "player")) |>
  filter(str_to_lower(player) %in% table_players)

trophy_data <- event_player_matches |>
  filter(match_wins >= 3, str_to_lower(player) %in% table_players) |>
  group_by(player, cube) |>
  summarise(trophies = n(), .groups = "drop")

cube_summary <- match_results |>
  group_by(cube) |>
  summarise(
    total_matches = n(),
    total_events = n_distinct(date),
    unique_players = n_distinct(c(player1, player2)),
    first_played = min(date),
    last_played = max(date),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ojs_define(per_cube_player_data = per_cube_player)
ojs_define(trophy_list = trophy_data)
ojs_define(cube_summary_data = cube_summary)
ojs_define(event_results_data = event_player_matches)
```

```{ojs}
//| label: theme-detect
isDark = Generators.observe(notify => {
  const current = () => document.body.classList.contains("quarto-dark");
  notify(current());

  const observer = new MutationObserver(() => {
    notify(current());
  });

  observer.observe(document.body, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ["class"] });
  return () => observer.disconnect();
})

themeColors = {
  const _ = isDark;
  const bodyStyles = getComputedStyle(document.body);
  const rootStyles = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement);
  const cssVar = (name, fallback = "") =>
    bodyStyles.getPropertyValue(name).trim() ||
    rootStyles.getPropertyValue(name).trim() ||
    fallback;

  return {
    blue: cssVar("--mtg-blue", "#0e68ab"),
    green: cssVar("--mtg-green", "#00733e"),
    red: cssVar("--mtg-red", "#d3202a"),
    gold: cssVar("--mtg-gold", "#8b6914"),
    text: cssVar("--text-primary", "#2a1f14"),
    muted: cssVar("--text-muted", "#5c4f42")
  };
}
```

```{ojs}
//| label: data-prep
perCubePlayer = transpose(per_cube_player_data).map(d => ({
  ...d,
  wins: +d.wins,
  losses: +d.losses,
  total: +d.total,
  winrate: +d.winrate
}))

trophies = transpose(trophy_list).map(d => ({
  ...d,
  trophies: +d.trophies
}))

cubeSummary = transpose(cube_summary_data).map(d => ({
  ...d,
  total_matches: +d.total_matches,
  total_events: +d.total_events,
  unique_players: +d.unique_players,
  first_played: new Date(d.first_played),
  last_played: new Date(d.last_played)
}))

eventResults = transpose(event_results_data).map(d => ({
  ...d,
  date: new Date(d.date),
  match_wins: +d.match_wins,
  matches: +d.matches,
  game_wins: +d.game_wins,
  game_losses: +d.game_losses
}))

cubeNames = [...new Set(cubeSummary.map(d => d.cube))].sort((a, b) =>
  a.localeCompare(b, "en")
)
```

:::: {.page-header}

```{=html}
<div class="mana-pips">
  <i class="ms ms-w mana-pip-w"></i>
  <i class="ms ms-u mana-pip-u"></i>
  <i class="ms ms-b mana-pip-b"></i>
  <i class="ms ms-r mana-pip-r"></i>
  <i class="ms ms-g mana-pip-g"></i>
</div>
```

# Cubes {.title}

[History and stats for individual cubes]{.page-desc}


::::

```{ojs}
//| label: cube-page-selector
viewof selectedCube = Inputs.select(["", ...cubeNames], {
  label: "Cube:",
  value: "",
  format: d => d === "" ? "Choose a cube..." : d
})
```

```{ojs}
//| label: cube-content
{
  if (selectedCube === "") {
    return html`<div class="empty-state">
      <div class="empty-icon">&#9876;</div>
      <div>Choose a cube to see details</div>
    </div>`;
  }

  const summary = cubeSummary.find(d => d.cube === selectedCube);
  const players = perCubePlayer
    .filter(d => d.cube === selectedCube)
    .sort((a, b) => b.winrate - a.winrate || b.total - a.total);
  const cubeTrophies = trophies
    .filter(d => d.cube === selectedCube)
    .sort((a, b) => b.trophies - a.trophies);
  const events = eventResults.filter(d => d.cube === selectedCube);

  const fmtDate = d => d.toLocaleDateString("en-GB", {
    day: "2-digit",
    month: "short",
    year: "numeric"
  });

  const summaryCard = html`<div class="player-summary">
    <div class="stat">
      <div class="stat-value" style="color: ${themeColors.blue};">${summary.total_events}</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Events</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat">
      <div class="stat-value" style="color: ${themeColors.red};">${summary.total_matches}</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Matches</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat">
      <div class="stat-value" style="color: ${themeColors.green};">${summary.unique_players}</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Players</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat">
      <div class="stat-value" style="color: ${themeColors.gold};">${fmtDate(summary.first_played)}</div>
      <div class="stat-label">First played</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat">
      <div class="stat-value" style="color: ${themeColors.gold};">${fmtDate(summary.last_played)}</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Last played</div>
    </div>
  </div>`;

  const trophyCard = cubeTrophies.length === 0 ? html`` : html`
    <div class="trophy-card">
      <div class="cube-affinity-title">Trophy leaders</div>
      <table class="trophy-table">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>Player</th>
            <th>Trophies</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          ${cubeTrophies.map(t => html`
            <tr>
              <td class="cube-record-name">${t.player}</td>
              <td style="text-align: center; font-weight: 600; color: ${themeColors.gold};">${"🏆".repeat(t.trophies)}</td>
            </tr>
          `)}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>`;

  const matchByPlayer = new Map();
  events.forEach(d => {
    if (!matchByPlayer.has(d.player)) matchByPlayer.set(d.player, { mw: 0, ml: 0 });
    const s = matchByPlayer.get(d.player);
    s.mw += d.match_wins;
    s.ml += d.matches - d.match_wins;
  });

  const enrichedPlayers = players.map(r => {
    const ms = matchByPlayer.get(r.player) || { mw: 0, ml: 0 };
    const mTotal = ms.mw + ms.ml;
    return { ...r, mw: ms.mw, ml: ms.ml, mTotal, mPct: mTotal > 0 ? Math.round(ms.mw / mTotal * 100) : 0 };
  });

  const rankingsCard = enrichedPlayers.length === 0 ? html`` : html`
    <div class="cube-combined-card">
      <div class="cube-affinity-title">Player results</div>
      <table class="cube-combined-table">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th></th>
            <th colspan="3" class="col-group-header">Matches</th>
            <th colspan="3" class="col-group-header">Games</th>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <th>Player</th>
            <th>W</th>
            <th>L</th>
            <th>%</th>
            <th>W</th>
            <th>L</th>
            <th>%</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          ${enrichedPlayers.map(r => html`
            <tr>
              <td class="cube-record-name">${r.player}</td>
              <td>${r.mw}</td>
              <td>${r.ml}</td>
              <td style="color: ${r.mPct >= 50 ? themeColors.green : themeColors.red}; font-weight: 600">${r.mPct}%</td>
              <td>${r.wins}</td>
              <td>${r.losses}</td>
              <td style="color: ${r.winrate >= 50 ? themeColors.green : themeColors.red}; font-weight: 600">${r.winrate}%</td>
            </tr>
          `)}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>`;

  return html`<div class="kubbar-content">
    ${summaryCard}
    ${trophyCard}
    ${rankingsCard}
  </div>`;
}
```

```{ojs}
//| label: event-date-selector
cubeEventDates = {
  if (selectedCube === "") return [];
  const events = eventResults.filter(d => d.cube === selectedCube);
  return [...new Set(events.map(d => +d.date))]
    .sort((a, b) => b - a);
}

viewof selectedEventDate = {
  if (cubeEventDates.length === 0) return Object.assign(html`<span></span>`, { value: "" });

  const fmtDate = ms => new Date(ms).toLocaleDateString("en-GB", {
    day: "2-digit",
    month: "short",
    year: "numeric"
  });

  const options = cubeEventDates.map(ms => ({ value: String(ms), label: fmtDate(ms) }));

  return Inputs.select(options.map(o => o.value), {
    label: "Event:",
    value: options[0].value,
    format: v => options.find(o => o.value === v)?.label || v
  });
}
```

```{ojs}
//| label: event-results
{
  if (selectedCube === "" || !selectedEventDate || cubeEventDates.length === 0) return html``;

  const dateMs = +selectedEventDate;
  const eventPlayers = eventResults
    .filter(d => d.cube === selectedCube && +d.date === dateMs)
    .sort((a, b) => b.match_wins - a.match_wins);

  if (eventPlayers.length === 0) return html``;

  return html`<div class="kubbar-content">
    <div class="recent-events-card">
      <div class="cube-affinity-title">Event results</div>
      <table class="trophy-table">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th></th>
            <th colspan="2" class="col-group-header">Matches</th>
            <th colspan="2" class="col-group-header">Games</th>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <th>Player</th>
            <th>W</th>
            <th>L</th>
            <th>W</th>
            <th>L</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          ${eventPlayers.map(p => html`
            <tr>
              <td class="cube-record-name">${p.player}${p.match_wins >= 3 ? " 🏆" : ""}</td>
              <td style="text-align: center">${p.match_wins}</td>
              <td style="text-align: center">${p.matches - p.match_wins}</td>
              <td style="text-align: center">${p.game_wins}</td>
              <td style="text-align: center">${p.game_losses}</td>
            </tr>
          `)}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>`;
}
```
